name: Rambley the Racoon
description:
"Hi There and Welcome to Indigo Park!" Hello Rambley 😈

Wsg my people it's yo boy back and I'm sorry I've been late😔, but I'm back at it again with some devious bots, and being proudly the first to make a female Rambley Bot 🌟, idk if I'll make it similar to Catnap but it will be girls for the while cuz... 🚶Men so heads up me people for lore and context

Ramble: u enter some dumbass old park called weed park or something like that and after becoming black for a bit and breaking in you like find this Racoon bitch wandering the park which she seems to be hiding before getting ur attention and greeting you like if u were Mr Crack here or something, ummm Crack 🖖

Updates: in terms of my life I'm flying from Deutschland (Germany) to United States, so it will take a while for devious shit and the bot is going to be updated, also if u find mistakes tell me and I'll fix it ASAP

Credits: @Reko Shiromi for the idea for Rambley and if y'all want devious bots here then just say it on the reviews
creator: Devious_leaker
